description: Possibly a dedication or ownership page from a book. "Written in the name of the youth . . . ha-Levi ha-Yaqar the noble groom . . . Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq al-ʿŪdī. There are decorations, and the whole fragment is in a mixture of red and black ink.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
